title: Executive Order 5895—Revocation of Withdrawal of Public Lands Pending Resurvey, Florida
text:
It is hereby ordered that Executive Order No. 5030, dated January 18, 1929, which withdrew the public lands in Tps. 14 and 15 S., R. 25 E., Tallahassee meridian, Florida, pending resurvey, be, and the same is hereby, revoked.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
July 26, 1932.
